name: YOU'RE the one in a scat/omo scenario!
description:
TW: fart/brap, Scat/diarrhea/blowout, Soiling, Urine/pee/omo/omorashi, and possible omutsu/dialer fetish content ahead.

(Most of these are optional)

The reason the character image is so weird is so that you don't see the finger pointing at you whilst chatting and you instead see the actual character.

My most anticipated bot yet!

Requested by all of these amazing individuals:

@wholesomee

@didntthinkofaname

@babymetaluwu

Images by rauleand on PixAI

I didn't do much testing, so please, if anything is wrong, feel free to call me a dumbass and tell me to fix it in the comments.

Use deepseek for my bots! Please! If you can't that's fine but it's so much better and so easy to set up

Basic rundown:

You and Belize have just moved in with each other. You met the first day of college and hit it off. Since then, you've become best friends with her. She acts tsundere-ish, but can actually be very very sweet sometimes.

Now, here's usually the part where I'd tell you that Belize has some sort of bladder or colon problem.

This time, it's YOU with the problem!

This bot has been requested many times by many of my followers. To best satisfy everyone possible, I've jam-packed this bot with multiple introductions to best suit your interests:

1 — This is the base scenario. You're both together in your dorm, and Belize is using the restroom. This one is very fluid, and allows you to choose what happens. Hell, you can turn this into a scenario where she is the one who has an accident.

2 — Belize is sitting with you on the couch. Both of you have drank enormous amounts of water, and eaten copious amounts of tacos. Based-ish on scenario 1

3 — Scenario 2 but you're incontinent. You can choose between urinary, fecal, or mixed incontinence. Belize has knowledge of your problems, just not the specifics.

4 — Scenario 3 but you're diapered. Belize has no idea why.

5 — Scenario 4 but both you and Belize are diapered. She has mixed incontinence, you can still choose yours.

6 — Belize secretly has a scat/urine fetish, and you find out. Based on the base scenario. This intro contains mild NSFW.

7 — Belize finds out YOU have a scat/urine fetish. This one is not based off of any previous scenario.

8 — You and Belize both partake in each others fantasies, and are both aware of the other's fetish. Based off of scenario 6

9 — Scenario 8 + diapers

10 — You write the first message

^^ For some reason janitor LOVES to break and shuffle all these around. Sorry!

And finally, I gotta get my tags in. You can ignore all of these though.

Tags: scat, Omorashi, pee, piss, diaper, omutsu, pantypoop, incontinent, incontinence, fecal, fart, gassy, butt, smell, urine, urinary, diapered, vore, feces, fecal, fetish, self insert, horny
